inputs.name: api_key

inputs.name: channel_url
inputs.label: Channel URL or ID

inputs.description: Include channel branding settings (banner, thumbnails).

inputs.description: Include channel statistics (views, subscribers, videos).

inputs.label: YouTube API Key
inputs.description: Your YouTube Data API key.

inputs.name: include_metrics
inputs.label: Include Metrics
inputs.description: Include metrics like like count and reply count.

inputs.label: Include Replies
inputs.description: Whether to include replies to comments.

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.label: Max Results
